## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (bug fixes include a regression test)
- [ ] `npm test`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Changeset added for user-visible changes (`npm run changeset`)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `types/index.d.ts`) if the public API changed
